name: Southern Style Baked Stuffed Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Keep the whole onions intact and peel away the outer layer.
3. Using a paring knife, carefully trim root ends so they are flat.
4. In a large pot of boiling water, cook onions for 10 minutes or until tender. Drain and let cool.
5. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine milk with bread and let it soak for 10 minutes. Squeeze the bread almost dry and break further into a large bowl.
6. Stir in egg, mushrooms, capers, parsley, garlic, salt, and pepper.
7. Cut onions in half horizontally. Scoop out some of the center from each onion and chop coarsely, reserving the halves.
8. Add the chopped onion to the bread mixture and mix well.
9. Fill the onion halves with the bread mixture and sprinkle with dry breadcrumbs.
10. Arrange the onions in a shallow 2-quart baking dish and drizzle with olive oil.
11. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
12. Bake uncovered for about 25 minutes or until the tops are golden and the onions are heated through.
